questions.explanation: Abundant means existing in large quantities.
Diligent means showing careful and persistent effort.
Candid means truthful and straightforward.
Resilient means able to recover quickly.
Scarce means insufficient or hard to find.
A curriculum is the subjects taught in a school or course.
Literacy means the skill of reading and writing.
Enroll means to officially join a course or institution.
Mandatory means something that must be done by law or rule.
Tuition usually refers to the fee paid for instruction.
A graduate is someone who has finished a course of study.
Community refers to people who share a location or interest.

options: People born in the same period
questions.correctAnswer: People born in the same period
questions.explanation: Generation refers to a group of people born around the same time.
Welfare refers to the health, happiness, and safety of people.
Equality means everyone has the same rights and opportunities.
Tradition is a custom passed down through generations.
Urban describes areas in or related to towns and cities.
Rural describes areas in the countryside.

options: Number of people in an area
questions.correctAnswer: Number of people in an area
questions.explanation: Population is the total number of people living somewhere.
Poverty means lacking enough money for basic needs.

options: Help given to those in need
questions.correctAnswer: Help given to those in need
questions.explanation: Charity is voluntary help, often money, given to people in need.
A volunteer offers their time or work without expecting payment.
Discipline means training to follow rules and control behavior.
Achieve means to succeed in reaching a goal.
Motivate means to give someone a reason to act.
Pollution is the presence of harmful substances in the environment.
Renewable resources can be naturally replenished, like solar energy.
Deforestation is the removal of large areas of forest.
Conservation means protecting and preserving the environment.
Emission refers to substances released into the air, like CO2.
Sustainable means using resources without depleting them for the future.
Habitat is the natural environment where an organism lives.
Extinct means a species has died out completely.
Drought is a prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall.
Erosion is the gradual wearing away of soil or rock.
Greenhouse gases trap heat in the Earth's atmosphere.
Recycle means processing waste to make it usable again.

options: Community of living things and environment
questions.correctAnswer: Community of living things and environment
questions.explanation: An ecosystem is a community of organisms and their environment.
Contaminate means to make something dirty or polluted.
Biodiversity refers to the variety of plant and animal life.
Carbon is an element central to discussions of emissions and climate.
Fossil fuels come from ancient organic remains, like coal and oil.
Wildlife refers to animals and plants living in natural conditions.
Climate refers to the typical weather conditions of a region over time.
Pesticide is a chemical used to kill insects or pests.
Device refers to a tool or piece of equipment, often electronic.
Innovation means introducing new ideas or methods.
Automate means to make a process work by itself, without people.
A network is a system of connected computers or people.
Software refers to programs that run on computers.
Hardware refers to the physical parts of a computer.
Upgrade means to improve something to a better version.
Virtual means something that exists digitally rather than physically.
Artificial means made by humans rather than occurring naturally.
Efficient means achieving results with minimal wasted effort or resources.
Convenient means something that is easy to use or access.
Access means the ability to use, enter, or obtain something.
Data refers to facts or information, especially for analysis.
Encrypt means to convert information into a secure code.
Malfunction means a device or system fails to work correctly.
Interface is the point where a user interacts with a system.
Bandwidth refers to the amount of data that can be transmitted.
An algorithm is a set of steps for solving a problem.
Outdated means old-fashioned or no longer current.
Compatible means two things can function together without issue.
Nutrition is the process of providing the body with food for health.
Diagnose means to identify the nature of an illness.
A symptom is a physical sign indicating a disease.
Hygiene refers to practices that keep people clean and healthy.
Obesity means having an unhealthy excess of body fat.
A vaccine is given to build immunity against a disease.
Chronic describes a condition that persists for a long time.
Therapy is treatment intended to relieve or heal a condition.
Immune means protected against a particular disease.
Fatigue is a feeling of extreme tiredness.
Sedentary describes a lifestyle with little physical activity.
Insomnia is difficulty falling or staying asleep.
Stress is a state of mental or emotional tension.
An allergy is a harmful immune reaction to a substance.
Recovery is the process of returning to good health.
A prescription is an order from a doctor for medicine.
An epidemic is a disease spreading rapidly among many people.
Mental refers to processes or health related to the mind.

options: State of being healthy and happy
questions.correctAnswer: State of being healthy and happy
questions.explanation: Wellbeing refers to a state of comfort, health, and happiness.
A remedy is something used to treat or cure an illness.
Inflation is a general increase in prices over time.
A recession is a significant decline in economic activity.
Revenue is the income a business or government generates.
A subsidy is money given by the government to support an industry.
A deficit occurs when expenses exceed income.
A surplus is an amount left over after requirements are met.

options: Money put into something for profit
questions.correctAnswer: Money put into something for profit
questions.explanation: Investment is committing money with the expectation of a return.
Trade refers to the exchange of goods and services.
A tariff is a tax imposed on imported or exported goods.
A monopoly exists when one company dominates a market.
A consumer is a person who purchases goods or services.

options: A raw material or product traded
questions.correctAnswer: A raw material or product traded
questions.explanation: A commodity is a basic good used in commerce, like oil or wheat.
A wage is money paid to a worker for their labor.
Unemployment refers to people without jobs who are seeking work.
Globalization is the process of increasing interconnection between countries.
An asset is something valuable owned by a person or company.
A liability is a debt or obligation owed.
Privatize means to move ownership from government to private hands.
Stagnant describes an economy that is not growing.
Outsource means hiring an outside company to do work.
Legislation refers to laws enacted by a governing body.
Bureaucracy refers to a complex system of administrative rules.
Diplomacy is the practice of managing relations between nations.
Censorship is the suppression of speech or information.
A referendum is a vote by the public on a specific issue.
Sovereignty is the authority of a state to govern itself.
Corruption involves dishonest conduct by those in power.

options: Group of voters in an area
questions.correctAnswer: Group of voters in an area
questions.explanation: A constituency is the residents represented by an elected official.
A welfare state provides social and economic support to citizens.
Demographic refers to characteristics of a population, like age or income.

options: Pushed to the edge of society
questions.correctAnswer: Pushed to the edge of society
questions.explanation: Marginalized describes groups excluded from mainstream society.
Discrimination is unjust treatment of different categories of people.
Activism involves vigorous campaigning for social or political change.
Censure is a strong formal criticism of someone's actions.
Accountability means being responsible for one's actions or decisions.
A coalition is a temporary alliance between groups, often political.
Autonomy is the right of self-government or independence.
Civic relates to the duties and rights of citizens.
Egalitarian means supporting equal rights and opportunities for all.
Polarization is the division of opinion into sharply contrasting groups.
A hypothesis is a proposed explanation to be tested.
Methodology refers to the methods used in research.
Empirical means based on evidence from observation or experiment.
Correlation describes a relationship between two or more variables.
A variable is a factor that can change in an experiment.
A sample is a smaller group selected to represent a population.
Bias is an inclination that prevents objective consideration.
A citation is a reference to a source used in research.
Plagiarism is presenting someone else's work as your own.

options: Evaluation by experts in the field
questions.correctAnswer: Evaluation by experts in the field
questions.explanation: Peer review is the evaluation of work by others in the same field.
Quantitative research involves numerical data and statistics.
Qualitative research involves descriptive, non-numerical data.
An abstract is a short summary of a research paper.

options: Combination of ideas into a whole
questions.correctAnswer: Combination of ideas into a whole
questions.explanation: Synthesis means combining different ideas to form a new whole.
Validity refers to how accurate and sound a result is.
An anomaly is something that deviates from the norm.
Replicate means to repeat a study to verify results.
An inference is a conclusion reached based on evidence and reasoning.
Theoretical refers to ideas based on theory rather than experience.
A longitudinal study collects data from subjects over a long period.
Controversial means causing disagreement or argument.
Perspective is a particular attitude toward something.
An implication is a likely consequence of an action.
Justify means to give a good reason for something.
Detrimental means harmful or damaging.
Beneficial means having a helpful or positive effect.
Inevitable means something is certain to occur.
Plausible means seeming reasonable or probable.
Significant means important enough to be worth attention.
Contradict means to assert the opposite of a statement.
Compromise is a settlement reached by mutual concession.
Prioritize means to deal with something as more important than others.
A consequence is a result or effect of an action.
A phenomenon is a fact or event that can be observed.
A norm is a standard pattern of behavior considered typical.

options: An oversimplified belief about a group
questions.correctAnswer: An oversimplified belief about a group
questions.explanation: A stereotype is a widely held but oversimplified idea about a group.
Integration means combining different elements into a unified whole.
Assimilate means to become part of a different culture or group.
Conform means to behave according to socially accepted standards.
Diverse means showing a great deal of variety.

options: Able to adapt to many functions
questions.correctAnswer: Able to adapt to many functions
questions.explanation: Versatile means capable of adapting to many different functions.
Tedious means tiresomely long or dull.
Spontaneous means happening naturally without being planned.
Reluctant means hesitant or unwilling.
Outgoing describes a sociable, friendly personality.

options: Having a strong desire to succeed
questions.correctAnswer: Having a strong desire to succeed
questions.explanation: Ambitious means having a strong desire for success or achievement.

Considerate means careful not to cause inconvenience or harm to others.

Leisure refers to time free from work for relaxation.
A hobby is an activity pursued for enjoyment in free time.
An achievement is something successfully accomplished through effort.

options: A strong desire to achieve something
questions.correctAnswer: A strong desire to achieve something

options: Having a great deal of wealth
questions.correctAnswer: Having a great deal of wealth

Volatile means liable to change unpredictably, often used for markets.

options: A large corporation of multiple firms

options: Person who works for wages only
questions.explanation: An entrepreneur is someone who starts and runs a business, taking on risk.

options: To form a theory without firm evidence
questions.correctAnswer: To form a theory without firm evidence

Recessionary describes conditions linked to economic downturn.

options: To support or form the basis of
questions.correctAnswer: To support or form the basis of

Degradation refers to the gradual decline in quality or condition.

options: Action to reduce severity of harm
questions.correctAnswer: Action to reduce severity of harm

options: Authority to govern or make decisions

questions.explanation: Jurisdiction is the official power to make legal decisions.

options: To distribute power away from center
questions.correctAnswer: To distribute power away from center
questions.explanation: Decentralize means to distribute administrative power away from a central location.

options: To compel observance of a law
questions.correctAnswer: To compel observance of a law

options: To adjust to a new climate/situation
questions.correctAnswer: To adjust to a new climate/situation
questions.explanation: Acclimatize means to become accustomed to a new environment.

Anthropogenic means originating from human activity, often used for climate change.

Stigma is a feeling of disapproval associated with a particular circumstance.
Resilient means capable of recovering quickly from difficulties.
Longevity refers to a long life or duration.

options: Likely to be affected by something
questions.correctAnswer: Likely to be affected by something

Cognizant means having knowledge or awareness of something.

options: A person taught only in school
questions.explanation: An autodidact is a person who has taught themselves a subject.

options: Use of machines to replace human labor

options: To copy others' work without credit
questions.correctAnswer: To copy others' work without credit

questions.correctAnswer: A lack of agreement between facts
questions.explanation: A discrepancy is a difference between things that should match.

options: A division into two contrasting parts
questions.correctAnswer: A division into two contrasting parts
questions.explanation: A dichotomy is a division between two opposite things.

options: An opinion based on incomplete information
questions.correctAnswer: An opinion based on incomplete information
questions.explanation: Conjecture is a guess or theory without complete evidence.

Cognizance refers to knowledge, awareness, or understanding of something.

options: To place side by side for contrast
questions.correctAnswer: To place side by side for contrast

options: To be a perfect example of

questions.correctAnswer: Dominance of one group over others

options: To deprive of rights, especially voting

options: Return of someone to their own country
questions.correctAnswer: Return of someone to their own country

questions.correctAnswer: Relating to politics influenced by geography

options: Transfer of power to lower levels

options: Relating to the economy as a whole
questions.correctAnswer: Relating to the economy as a whole

options: A collection of varied things into one mass

options: Strictness and precision in research methods

options: To arrange into layers or categories

options: Relating to an organism's complete genetic material

questions.explanation: Genomic refers to the complete set of genes in an organism.

options: Relating to climate of the past
questions.correctAnswer: Relating to climate of the past

options: Impact of human activity on environment
questions.correctAnswer: Impact of human activity on environment

options: Belief one's own culture is superior

questions.explanation: Ethnocentrism is judging other cultures by the standards of one's own.

options: Presence of multiple diseases at once

options: Symptoms with a purely physical cause
Physical symptoms caused by mental factors

options: Dominance of one culture's values over others

questions.explanation: Cultural hegemony refers to one culture's dominance shaping social norms.

options: The act of conquering or controlling

options: A person's inherent qualities of character

options: Belonging to a different time period

options: Understood by only a small group

options: The most perfect embodiment of a quality

options: To express the essential features concisely

options: A change of circumstances, often difficult

options: Combined effect greater than individual parts

options: Wishing to do one's work well and properly

options: Done with minimal effort or reflection

questions.explanation: Perfunctory means carried out with minimal effort, as a routine duty.

options: Open to more than one interpretation

options: Having a harmful effect, especially gradually

options: Lasting for a very short time

options: To clear of blame or suspicion

options: To exclude someone from a group

questions.explanation: Ostracize means to deliberately exclude someone from a community.

options: To find a way around an obstacle

options: Very attentive to detail and accuracy

options: Combining practical action with high ideals
questions.correctAnswer: Combining practical action with high ideals
questions.explanation: Pragmatic idealism blends practical methods with a commitment to ideals.

options: The appearance of being true or real
